title: PULSEmech compute planned-observed relation v0

expectations.$comment: Expectation IDs are object keys so duplicate identifiers cannot be represented after strict duplicate-key parsing.

observations.$comment: Observation IDs are object keys so duplicate identifiers cannot be represented after strict duplicate-key parsing.

relations.$comment: Relation IDs are object keys so duplicate identifiers cannot be represented after strict duplicate-key parsing.

findings.$comment: Finding IDs are object keys so duplicate identifiers cannot be represented after strict duplicate-key parsing.

runtime_packet_binding.$comment: release_candidate_id must equal comparison_identity.release_candidate_id and the compute-binding report candidate; the strict validator enforces this cross-record equality because portable Draft 2020-12 cannot compare arbitrary sibling instance values.

$comment: Cross-record equality for subject repository, run key, source commit, release candidate, and exact input digests is enforced by the strict validator in this contract PR. Draft 2020-12 cannot express arbitrary sibling-instance equality.
